SharedFlowBundle.name: PANW-AIRS
SharedFlowBundle.Description: Prisma AIRS unified security-scanning SharedFlow for Apigee X. Multi-format (OpenAI chat + Responses, Anthropic, Gemini/Vertex, MCP), prompt/response/both, streaming, DLP masking, inline tool-call scanning, and Claude Code aware. Included from any proxy's request and response flows.
